meaning: n.男士无尾半正式晚礼服
examples: He is looking pretty spiffy in a white tux and black bow-tie.
He looked so handsome in his tux.
However, a small Tux sits on a shelf.
When a tall, handsome stranger in a tux sidles up to you at No. 10.
Judges might exercise that right when Joe Pesci waltzes into the courtroom wearing a leather jacket or blue tux.
